metadata.title: [FAQ]-09: Custom Metrics and Attributes — Creation, Management, and Best Practices
metadata.description: Custom metrics and attributes extend Dynatrace observability. This notebook covers ingestion patterns, naming conventions, cardinality management, and integration strategies.
metadata.author: Dynatrace Best-Practice Notebooks

sections.title: Custom Metrics — Overview
sections.content: Custom metrics and attributes extend Dynatrace observability beyond pre-configured instrumentation.

queries.dql: fetch metrics | filter isCustom == true | fields metric | sort metric
fetch metrics("custom.app.latency") | summarize count() by payment_method
